scripts.dev:all: zsh -lc 'trap "kill 0" INT TERM EXIT; npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend & wait'
scripts.demo: zsh -lc 'trap "kill 0" INT TERM EXIT; npm run start:backend & npm run start:frontend & wait'
scripts.clean:backend-cache: rm -rf backend/.pytest_cache backend/chroma_db && find backend -path '*/__pycache__' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} +
scripts.clean:caches: npm run clean:frontend && npm run clean:backend-cache
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && cd backend && venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
